sellers_note: Discover the rugged capability and versatile features of this 2015 Toyota Tacoma Base V6. The Towing Package equips this truck with a heavy-duty hitch, wiring, and trailer sway control for confident towing. With its spacious crew cab, durable bed, and advanced safety technologies, this Tacoma is ready to be your go-to truck for work, play, and everything in between.The Entune Audio Plus system provides seamless connectivity with Bluetooth, USB, and satellite radio. You'll also appreciate the convenience of the tailgate-integrated backup camera, remote keyless entry, and variable intermittent wipers.
